overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running along a mountain ridge during golden hour. The character traverses rocky terrain and grassy hillsides with a large mechanical Tallneck structure visible in the distance across a misty lake, surrounded by red rock formations and scattered vegetation.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the ridge path overlooking the lake, heading toward the distant mechanical structure

entered.detail: massive giraffe-like machine structure standing in the lake distance with long neck and circular platform
calm body of water nestled between mountain ranges with mist rising from surface
layered mountain peaks fading into atmospheric haze
tall coniferous tree with green foliage
uneven trail surface with loose stones and dry earth

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain ridge during golden hour, with the character running along a rocky dirt path. A massive mechanical Tallneck stands prominently in the far distance across a misty lake, while scattered pine trees dot the landscape. The warm sunlight casts long shadows across the terrain as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside trail with red rock wall

events.description: terrain shifts to reveal large red rock cliff face on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: running along the cliff edge with the red rock wall to the left and open lake view to the right

entered.detail: steep cliff face with layered red and orange sedimentary rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character continues running along a narrow cliffside path where a massive red rock wall rises on the left. The mechanical Tallneck remains visible across the lake, now appearing slightly closer. The terrain becomes more rugged with scattered boulders as the path curves along the cliff edge.

events.description: ground surface transitions from rocky dirt to dense green grass and vegetation

agents.ego_description: running downhill through grassy terrain toward the mechanical structure, navigating around rocks and bushes

entered.detail: thick grass covering the hillside with patches of wildflowers
narrow stream winding through the valley below

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character descending a grassy hillside covered in dense green vegetation. The mechanical Tallneck looms much closer now, revealing more structural detail. The red rock cliff falls behind as the landscape opens into a verdant valley with a small creek visible in the distance, maintaining the warm golden hour lighting throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain ridge that transitions from a rocky high-altitude path into a lush, verdant valley. It begins with the character running along a dirt ridge under the warm glow of golden hour, with a massive mechanical Tallneck standing prominently across a misty lake in the far distance. As the character moves forward, the path narrows into a rugged cliffside where a towering red rock wall rises on the left and the Tallneck appears to draw closer. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the cliffs onto a grassy hillside covered in dense green vegetation, leaving the red rocks behind. Finally, the landscape opens into a wide valley with a distant creek, while the Tallneck looms much larger and more detailed against the persistent golden light.
